Name: ViewSonic - VX2776-4K-MHDU 27" IPS LCD 4K UHD Monitor (HDMI, DisplayPort) - Silver
Description: Whether you're working hard on a presentation or watching a movie, the ViewSonic VX2776-4K-mhdu is designed to take your setup to the next level. Featuring a SuperClear IPS panel and a sleek frameless design, this monitor provides a near-seamless viewing experience that's ideal for multi-monitor configurations. Stunning 4K Ultra HD resolution delivers four times more pixels than Full HD monitors, so you can have the clarity and precision you need for work and play. USB-C 3.2 connectivity lets you send video, audio, data and 65W of charging power over a single cable, while HDMI and DisplayPort inputs keep you connected to your favorite devices. HDR10 content support helps this monitor display vivid colors at a brightness that substantially exceeds standard monitors.
Text3: Computers & Tablets,Monitors,All Monitors

Name: ViewSonic - XG2536 25" IPS LCD FHD FreeSync 0.5ms 280Hz Gaming Monitor (HDMI, USB-C) - Black
Description: Maximize your gameplay with the 25 inch XG2536 esports monitor. With a 24.5 inch screen size, this monitor will keep all the action within your peripheral vision while providing a lightning fast 280Hz refresh rate (OC) and 0.5ms response time. Get closer to the action with a specially designed narrow footprint stand, allowing you to put your mouse and keyboard closer to the monitor for a more comfortable gaming experience. Equipped with AMD FreeSync Premium technology, this monitor virtually eliminates screen tearing and stuttering for fluid gameplay during fast-paced action scenes. With the option of DisplayPort, HDMI, or USB-C with 65w power delivery, this monitor can connect to any of the newest gaming devices while keeping your laptop, phone, or controller charged.
Text3: Computers & Tablets,PC Gaming,Gaming Monitors

Name: StarTech.com - Monitor Riser Stand with Wireless Charging Pad, 15W Qi Charger for Phone, Height Adjustable - Black
Description: Raise your monitor to eye level for more comfortable viewing, while charging your mobile devices with the integrated wireless charging pad. This monitor riser stand also supports other types of devices like laptops or printers up to 33 lb. (15 kg) Avoiding Neck/Shoulder Strain while Saving Space This computer monitor stand enables you to easily increase the maximum height of your monitor by 3.3" or 4.6" from the desk surface, reducing neck/shoulder strain. With a mounting surface of 23.6 in (60 cm) x 9.8 in (25 cm), the monitor stand creates a storage area of 21" under the platform to store devices like your docking station, USB Hub, keyboard, or office supplies. Wirelessly Charge Your Mobile Devices Securely charge your smartphone or tablet with the integrated Qi™ Certified 15W wireless fast charging pad. The charging pad sits flush with the surface of the riser for a clean and sleek design. Protect Your Desk With the included rubber feet, your riser will stay in place and will ensure your desk surface is protected against scratches. MONSTADQI is backed by a StarTech.com 2-year warranty and free lifetime technical support.

Name: Samsung - ViewFinity 32" S6 (S60D) QHD HR10 High Resolution Monitor with Easy Setup Stand (USB Hub, HDMI, DisplayPort) - Black
Description: The Samsung ViewFinity S6 is a 32-inch LED-backlit LCD monitor designed to meet the needs of professionals seeking high performance and precision. With a QHD resolution of 2560 x 1440, it delivers detailed and vivid images. The monitor has a 99% sRGB color gamut and supports 1.07 billion colors, making it perfect for tasks requiring color accuracy such as graphic design and photo editing. Ergonomics are prioritized with adjustable height, pivot, swivel, and tilt functions, alongside an easy setup stand, ensuring a comfortable and productive workspace. Connectivity is streamlined through HDMI, DisplayPort, and a built-in USB 3.0 hub, facilitating a seamless integration of devices. Additionally, the monitor is equipped with HDR10 support, Adaptive Picture, Eye Saver Mode, and Flicker-Free technology, offering an optimized viewing experience that minimizes eye strain. The Samsung ViewFinity S6 stands out as a versatile and high-quality choice for professionals.
Text3: Computers & Tablets,Monitors,All Monitors

Name: Unique Bargains - 2pcs 5ft RCA Audio Subwoofer Cable, 1 RCA Male Plug to Bare Wire Open End Audio Video Speaker for Amplifier Home Theater - White Red
Description: RCA subwoofer audio cables are primarily used to connect audio equipment to subwoofer. You can use RCA subwoofer cables to connect an AV receiver to a subwoofer in a home theater system. RCA cables can also be used to connect music players, stereo systems, or audio receivers. In a car audio system, you can use RCA subwoofer cables to connect car audio equipment to a car subwoofer. RCA sub woofer audio cables can also be used to connect mixing consoles, audio processors, or speaker systems.

Description: PD trigger cable that converts USB-C Power transport (PD) output to a stable DC power supply through 4.0x1.7mm right-angle connector. The PD trigger line works with PD-compliant power sources to deliver the precise voltages required by devices such as tablets, laptops, routers, speakers, monitors, portable displays, single-board computers, and low-power electronics without the need for bulky adapters.

Name: ViewSonic - VG2455-2K 24" IPS QHD Monitor (USB-C, HDMI, DisplayPort) - Black
Description: Designed for the modern day office, the ViewSonic VG2455-2K monitor delivers an efficient end-to-end enterprise experience. USB 3.1 Type-C connectivity provides charging power, video, and audio over a single connector for convenience and reduced cable clutter. SuperClear IPS panel technology delivers wide-angle viewing and incredibly vivid colors, while 3-sided thin bezel design provides a seamless viewing experience for multi-monitor setups. For enhanced productivity, an advanced ergonomic design offers a wide range of customizable adjustments for maximum comfort including pivot, swivel, height adjustment, and tilt. With the ability to tilt an impressive 40-degrees, this 24-Inch monitor is ideal for users who prefer to work while standing up, as well as for those who like to use their screen for group discussions. Along with USB 3.1 Type-C, additional connectivity options include HDMI, DisplayPort, and USB 3.0. This monitor is also shipped in eco-friendly biodegradable packaging, along with an easy-to-install quick release stand that makes for simple out-of-the box setup. The quick release stand also includes an integrated client mount and cable management features.

Description: Experience incredible color and superior black performance with UltraSharp 24" Class Monitor. Built-in Ambient Light Sensor intelligently optimizes brightness and color temperature based on your surroundings to help reduce eye strain plus with ComfortView Plus technology, harmful blue light emissions drop to <35%, for all-day comfort without sacrificing color accuracy. A 120Hz refresh rate delivers less flicker, more seamless scrolling and smoother motion and with a tilt, swivel, pivot, and height adjustable stand, you can work your way all day. Description: Samsung's Odyssey G30D Gaming Monitor features 180Hz refresh rate and 1ms response time (MPRT) which enables faster, exhilarating gameplay with ultra-smooth action and minimal blur. AMD Radeon FreeSync keeps the monitor and graphics card refresh rate in sync, reducing image tearing for seamless, smooth scenes. Black Equalizer allows you to adjust dark areas in games, letting you spot your enemies in even the darkest hiding nooks. Eye Saver Mode minimizes blue light and reduces irritating screen flicker for more comfortable gaming, and the 3-sided borderless design provides maximum space for bigger, bolder gameplay, enabling a precise dual-monitor setup. Features an ergonomic stand to adjust your monitor height for optimal comfort when playing for extended periods of time.

Name: ViewSonic - TD2423D 24" LCD FHD Touch Screen Monitor (HDMI, VGA, USB and, DisplayPort) - Black
Description: Great for public kiosks, POS displays, and other retail and commercial applications, the ViewSonic TD2423d is a 24” touch display with 10-point IR touch technology that lets users pinch, zoom and swipe for fast and intuitive navigation. With Full HD 1920x1080 resolution, 1000:1 static contrast ratio and 7H screen hardness, the TD2423d delivers sharp and bright images combined with durability for high-traffic applications. Flexible connectivity options include HDMI, DisplayPort, VGA, DVI, and a USB hub to connect your peripherals and accessories. VESA-mount compatibility offers additional convenience and flexibility for 3rd party stands and mounts. What’s more, ViewSonic’s exclusive ViewMode feature provides intuitive presets that deliver optimized screen performance in different applications. In addition, Flicker-Free technology and a Blue Light Filter help to eliminate eyestrain from extended viewing periods for improved productivity. Whether in retail or deployed in a high-traffic commercial setting, its scratch-resistant surface stands up to heavy use and safeguards its high quality touch experience. Combine this display with ViewSonic's Android and Windows media players for a perfect kiosk solution.

Name: ACGAM - Dual Monitor Desk Mount, Heavy Duty Fully Adjustable Steel Stand for 2 Computer Screens 17-30 Inch and Max 19.8lbs Each - Matte Black
Description: Crafted from high-quality, durable steel, the ACGAM monitor arm is designed to provide robust and reliable support for monitors weighing up to 19.8 lbs per arm. The solid steel construction not only enhances stability but also ensures that your monitor is securely held in place, minimizing the risk of accidents. The ACGAM MDS-1D articulated steel dual-monitor mount provides an impressive range of adjustments, including ±45° tilt angles, ±90° swivel angles, and ±180° screen rotation capabilities. Additionally, it allows for a maximum height of 16” and a maximum extension of 14.8” per screen. This versatility enables you to customize your screen setup to meet your specific needs and enhances your workflow. Compatible with 75x75 and 100x100mm VESA sizes, the ACGAM monitor mount can support monitors weighing up to 19.8 lbs and screen sizes from 17” to 32”. This versatility caters to a range of user needs, whether for office work or gaming.

Name: HP - Series 3 Pro 327pf 27" FHD IPS Monitor, Anti-Glare, Flicker Free, Display Port & DKZ Hub, (B0CG3UT#ABA) 2 Pack - Black
Description: This HP 27-inch flat IPS display delivers sharp and vibrant visuals with a Full HD (1920 x 1080) resolution and a 16:9 aspect ratio. Featuring a 5ms GtG response time (with overdrive) and a 100 Hz refresh rate, it ensures smooth motion and reduced blur, ideal for work, entertainment, or light gaming. The screen supports up to 16.7 million colors, covers 72% of the NTSC color gamut, and has a contrast ratio of 1000:1, providing excellent detail and color accuracy. With a pixel pitch of 0.3114 x 0.3114 mm and 82 pixels per inch (ppi), it offers clear and precise image quality. The monitor sports a sleek black finish with a 3-sided borderless bezel, creating a modern, immersive viewing experience. Its 8-bit (6-bit + FRC) panel depth delivers smooth color transitions, while the brightness level of 250 nits ensures comfortable visibility in various lighting conditions. Designed for comfort, it features flicker-free technology and an Eye Saver Mode to minimize eye strain during extended use. Ergonomically designed, the display offers a tilt adjustment range from -5° to +20° and wide 178° vertical and horizontal viewing angles for consistent visuals from any position. It supports VESA mounting (100 mm x 100 mm) for flexible installation options. Connectivity options include 1 x HDMI, 1 x DisplayPort, and 1 x VGA, offering versatility for multiple devices. This model does not include a built-in camera or speakers, keeping the design clean and professional. Measuring 24.06 x 7.96 x 20.07 inches and weighing 12.91 pounds, it balances size and portability effectively. Additionally, the package includes the Docztorm USB HUB (Special Edition Portable Docztorm Data Hub), featuring a super-speed data sync rate of up to 5Gbps for enhanced connectivity and productivity.
